title: Backend Engineer
description: Who are we? Our business is technology, food and retail. We are a young team that combines all resources with technology; Our goal is to provide an excellent e-commerce service to meet your needs. In short, you can call us Migros One. 😉 Today, as a team that holds the “Great Place To Work” certificate with the contributions of our employees we produce, learn and develop together. We rediscover our passion for our business every day and build Migros One culture together. Our Culture We are #ONE to create a better tomorrow for our community. Our way of working includes four core values that we strive to act: 1. Take accountability with passion 2. Drive innovation with curiosity 3. Make a difference for our customers 4. Create open communication We live these values every day and create an environment where everyone enjoys working. Our business culture based on trust, openness and innovation has been recognized with our “Great Place To Work” certificate! What Do We Do? As Migros One; We spread happiness in being the pioneer of innovation in the field of food and retail technology with our brands Migros Sanal Market, Migros Hemen, Migros Extra, Migros Yemek, Macroonline, Tazedirekt, Mion and Petimo! Our determination to find fast and effective solutions always keeps us one step ahead. Our team's passion and energy make their jobs enjoyable. Thanks to our people-oriented approach, we aim to create a more comfortable and practical world for everyone by using them all. We constantly strive to provide the best experience to our consumers and employees!As Migros One team, we get excited with every member of our team creating his/her own career story! If you would like to be a part of this visionary and tech-savvy e-commerce team, don’t wait! Make your application! We are looking for Backend Engineer who will be on our team. What You'll Be Doing: Contributing the software development lifecycle. (technical design, implementation, testing, deployment, monitoring) Collaborate with cross-functional teams. Develop and maintain scalable and reliable backend systems. Monitor and optimize system performance. What You'll Bring: Minimum 4 years of experience as a back-end engineer, Production experience with Java and Spring Boot Hands-on experience with OOP, Design Patterns and TDD Hands-on experience with microservice architecture Experience with Restful API design Familiar with event-driven systems and technologies (SQS, Apache Kafka) AWS, Docker, Kubernetes knowledge is nice-to-have

title: Full Stack Java Developer (Banking)
description: Would you like to perform rewarding work while contributing to the success of an established, growing company? We are looking for a Full Stack Java Developer with banking sector experience to work on innovative digital banking solutions. Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field. Minimum 3 years of full-stack development experience, preferably in the banking sector. Strong Java, Spring Framework, and front-end framework skills. Familiarity with Docker, AWS, MSSQL, PostgreSQL. Good understanding of data modeling and integration. Strong communication skills, teamwork, and analytical thinking. Responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain banking-related software solutions. Implement Java applications with Spring Framework (MVC, Boot, Data), JPA, Hibernate, and SQL. Develop responsive front-end components using React and/or Vue.js with JavaScript/TypeScript. Integrate back-end web services via REST and SOAP. Apply design patterns and microservices architecture. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver secure and compliant banking applications. Ability to approach AI with curiosity and intention, actively incorporating AI-powered tools into workflows to enhance productivity and drive innovation. OBSS is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We make recruiting decisions without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, age, gender, sexual orientation, marital status, veteran status or disability status. https://medium.com/codable

title: Full Stack Developer +4
description: İş Tanımı Şirketimiz bünyesinde yürütülen uluslararası ve/veya yurt içi projelerde görev alacak, deneyimli ve yetkin takım arkadaşları aramaktayız. Genel Nitelikler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun, İyi seviyede İngilizce okuma, yazma ve anlama becerisine sahip, Uluslararası veya yurt içi projelerde çalışma deneyimi bulunan, Ankara’da ikamet eden veya edebilecek , Yurt içi ve yurt dışı seyahat engeli bulunmayan, Kişi güvenlik belgesi alınmasına engel herhangi bir durumu bulunmayan. Teknik Deneyim ve Yetkinlikler A. Aranan Yetkinlikler En az 4 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimine sahip, Java Spring Framework (Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Spring Security) ve Eksen Framework konularında tecrübeli, Angular, PrimeNG ve TypeScript ile frontend geliştirme deneyimi olan, Veri yapıları, nesne yönelimli tasarım ve programlama konularında bilgi sahibi, MongoDB ve PostgreSQL ile veritabanı tasarımı konusunda deneyimli, Mikroservis mimarisi , web servisleri ve Sürekli Entegrasyon (CI) süreçlerinde deneyim sahibi, Kafka ve RabbitMQ gibi mesajlaşma sistemleri hakkında bilgi sahibi, Yazılım mimarileri konusunda bilgi sahibi, Yazılım konfigürasyon ve kalite yönetimi süreçlerine hâkim, REST API ve JSON tabanlı uygulama geliştirme konusunda tecrübeli. B. Tercih Edilen Yetkinlikler Tercihen Kovan altyapısı konusunda deneyiminin olması, Docker ve Kubernetes ile geliştirme deneyimi olan, CSS ve Bootstrap ile arayüz geliştirme deneyimi bulunan, QueryDSL tecrübesine sahip, Git, DOORS, JIRA, Jenkins, Nexus, Harbor gibi yazılım yaşam döngüsü araçlarını kullanabilen, ArgoCD hakkında bilgi sahibi, Agile / Scrum metodolojileri konusunda deneyimli.

title: Full Stack Developer (Next.js / Node.js)
description: Location: Remote / Turkey-based Project Stage: Post-Investment / Scaling to MVP About the Role We are a fast-growing SaaS startup revolutionizing the e-export and Print-on-Demand (POD) landscape. Having recently secured a significant investment round, we are rapidly moving towards our Q2 MVP launch and our full commercial release on July 1st. We are looking for a visionary Senior Full Stack Developer to join our core team—alongside our founders and lead developers—to help build, scale, and automate the future of global e-commerce. As an early member of the engineering team, you will have a direct impact on the architecture and product direction of a platform designed to empower Etsy sellers and global exporters through advanced automation and AI-driven content management. What You Will Do Develop end-to-end, high-performance, and scalable SaaS features using Next.js (React) and Node.js . Architect and optimize complex backend workflows and automation pipelines using n8n . Design and manage our database schema and real-time data layers on Supabase . Implement and maintain robust third-party integrations, with a primary focus on the Etsy API and social media automation. Manage deployment cycles and CI/CD processes on Vercel to ensure rapid, high-quality releases. Collaborate closely with the founder and the engineering team. Requirements Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer, ideally within a startup or SaaS environment. Deep expertise in the modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem, with a strong focus on Next.js and Node.js . Strong proficiency in relational databases and SQL (PostgreSQL/Supabase experience is a major plus). Experience building and consuming RESTful APIs and managing complex third-party integrations. Hands-on experience with Vercel and modern cloud deployment strategies. A proactive, problem-solving mindset with the ability to work autonomously in a fast-paced environment. Bonus Points Prior experience with n8n or other low-code/no-code automation platforms.● Knowledge of e-commerce business logic, Print-on-Demand workflows, or the Etsy marketplace. Experience in early-stage startups and scaling products from 0 to 1. What We Offer The opportunity to be part of a high-potential startup at a critical growth stage. A highly technical and collaborative work environment with a focus on automation and cutting-edge tools. Flexible working conditions and the chance to shape the technical culture of the company.

title: Full Stack Developers
description: We are Hiring Full-Stack Developers We are a rapidly growing Fintech company looking to expand our technical team. We are currently seeking 3 talented Full-Stack Developers to help us build and scale our financial systems. 💻 Our Tech Stack: 🔸 Backend: Node.js / Python / PHP (Laravel) 🔸 Frontend: React / Next.js / Angular 🔸 Databases: MySQL / PostgreSQL / Redis 🔸 Message Brokers: RabbitMQ / Kafka Key Requirements: Location: Kağıthane, Istanbul (100% On-site – no remote/hybrid options available) Job Type: Full-time Deep understanding of RESTful API architecture, web security concepts, and proficiency in Git. Bonus Points (Nice to have): ✔️ Previous experience in Fintech, financial projects, or trading systems. ✔️ Experience with Docker and CI/CD pipelines. ✔️ Familiarity with AI-assisted development ("Vibe Coding") and modern AI IDEs like Cursor or AntiGravity. 💵 Salary: Highly competitive and negotiable based on your experience and skill level
